---
title: "Mary Sophia Rogers"
---

## Mary Sophia Rogers

**Dates:** (d. 1900)

### Description

niece by marriage of Charlotte (Willyams) Rogers

### Biography

She was probably the Mary Rogers who was co-editor with Charlotte (Willyams) Rogers of Charlotte (Willyams) Pascoe’s <i>Walks about St. Hilary</i>, and therefore possibly CMY\'s correspondent in 1879. [LG]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 22nd [1879?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
